name: HWR_WLNS_COACH_ASSIGNMENT
description: This table stores the coaching assignment request details.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the coaching assignments tables.

columns.Name: COACH_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the id of the coach assigned for the record.

columns.Name: COACHING_TOPIC_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the id of the coaching topic for which the coaching request is raised.

columns.Name: COACHEE_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the person id of the requester/coachee.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column indicates status of the coaching assignment record.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the date at the beginning of coaching assignment with a coach.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the date at the end of coaching assignment with a coach.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the id of communication source.

columns.Name: CONVERSATION_ID
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the id of conversation.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: This column for extra coaching assignment attribute 1.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: This column for storing extra coaching assignment attribute 2.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: This column for storing extra coaching assignment attribute 3.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: This column for storing extra coaching assignment attribute 4.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ATTR_5
columns.Comments: This column for storing extra coaching assignment attribute 5.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ATTR_6
columns.Comments: This column for storing extra coaching assignment attribute 6.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ATTR_7
columns.Comments: This column for storing extra coaching assignment attribute 7.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
